dbEquipBonuses.name: Guardian's Impact
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your targets for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single action, you and your 2 closest allies within 25' gain +1.3% Defense and +2% Critical Avoidance for 10 seconds (10 second cooldown).

dbEquipBonuses.name: Liquid Luck
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Critical Strike for each player in your team. When moving, gain 5% Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Liquid Luck
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Critical Strike for each player in your team. When moving, gain 5% Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Menacing Aura
dbEquipBonuses.description: You gain an aura that decreases enemy Defense, Awareness, and Critical Avoidance by 3.5% for enemies standing within 10ft of you. Multiple of the same aura will not stack.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Versatility
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your powers, you have a 10% chance to increase one of the following stats by 8% for 10 seconds: Accuracy, Combat Advantage, Critical Avoidance, or Deflect Severity. (30 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Versatility

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Remedy
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, you have a 10% chance to restore 5% of your Maximum Hit Points. (5s CD)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Remedy

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Remedy
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, you have a 10% chance to restore 5% of your Maximum Hit Points. This effect may only occur once every 5 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Radiant Empowerment
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your targets for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single action, you and your 2 closest allies within 25' gain +3.5% Power for 5 seconds (5 second cooldown).

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Frenzy
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, for the next 30 seconds your next Encounter Power deals +75% more Damage.
